missing_requirements.evidence_quote: In our modern metropolitan city, people don’t follow the traffic rules.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall educate drivers about traffic rules.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Conventional traffic signals are not efficient and strict.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall improve conventional traffic signal efficiency.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall regulate traffic flow using automated traffic lights to avoid congestions.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of regulating traffic flow in the source text. The focus is on minimizing risks and taking precautionary actions.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall monitor roads with high traffic levels to facilitate traffic signals.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall monitor roads with high traffic levels to facilitate traffic signals.
duplicates.reason: This requirement is identical in both the source text and rewritten requirements.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall warn drivers using helmet and seat belt detection via image processing.
ambiguities.reason: The source text mentions 'helmet and seat belt detection' but does not specify how it will be done. The rewritten requirement assumes image processing.

prompt:
You are a strict requirements validator.
Compare rewritten requirements against the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "missing_requirements": [
    {
      "evidence_quote": "string",
      "suggested_requirement": "The system shall ..."
    }
  ],
  "hallucinations": [
    {
      "rewritten_requirement": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "duplicates": [
    {
      "requirement_a": "string",
      "requirement_b": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "ambiguities": [
    {
      "rewritten_requirement": "string",
      "reason": "string"
    }
  ],
  "overall_assessment": "pass|needs_review"
}

Source text:
<<<
In our modern metropolitan city, people don’t follow the traffic rules. The outcome of it is unfortunate. In India, 64.4% of the total deaths are accounted by road accidents. As the automobiles get
revolutionized the number of vehicles keep increasing. Conventional traffic signals are not efficient
and strict. Smart traffic system aims in minimizing the risks of accidents by precautionary taking
actions on people who violate the traffic rules. Cameras to monitor the roads with high traffic
levels in order to facilitate the traffic signal. Helmet and seat belt detection using image processing
to warn the drivers. Details of the driver are submitted to the traffic police, when he/she violates
the law more than two times via the number plate which is captured by cameras. Street lights are
operated based on the population density on road at night, thereby saving electricity. License will
be cancelled as penalty, if the law is violated. Details of the driver will be passed on to successive
signals on account of speeding. Automated traffic lights regulate the traffic flow in order to avoid
congestions (Figures 21.1–21.8)
>>>

Rewritten requirements JSON:
{
  "rewritten_requirements": [
    "The system shall monitor roads with high traffic levels to facilitate traffic signals.",
    "The system shall warn drivers using helmet and seat belt detection via image processing.",
    "The system shall submit details of the driver to the traffic police via the number plate when the driver violates the law more than two times.",
    "The system shall operate street lights based on population density at night to save electricity.",
    "The system shall cancel the license as a penalty for violating the law.",
    "The system shall pass details of the driver to successive signals in case of speeding.",
    "The system shall regulate traffic flow using automated traffic lights to avoid congestions."
  ]
}
